Carrier · Web

Taşıyıcı dashboard — Coming soon. The carrier surface handles job browsing, bid submission, delivery tracking, and fleet management. Currently 5 screens in Figma; full UI kit pending Figma expansion.

Mapped screens: Dashboard, Aktif İlanlar, İlan Detayı, Tekliflerim, Geçmiş
See docs/figma/design-spec.md § 4.4
